name: Odessa
speech_patterns: Often uses exclamation marks when describing findings
Frames objectives as expeditions or quests
References maps, ruins, and unexplored territories
quirks: Always the first to suggest exploring new areas
Keeps a mental catalog of every rare drop location
Refers to the group as 'fellow adventurers'
example_phrases: Has anyone charted the northern caves yet? I heard whispers of ancient glyphs!
This expedition calls for a Stormcaller! Count me in.
By the winds, that's a magnificent specimen!
Mark your maps - there's a rare spawn at the old frontier post.
Every legend starts with someone brave enough to venture into the unknown.
